title: Consolidate search into single module
rationale: hybrid_search, indexing, and search were fragmented across 5 files sharing the same data model and query patterns; merging reduces cognitive overhead and import complexity

title: Domain functions belong in their domain module
rationale: rank_related_decisions operated on decisions tables but lived in search.py, creating a misleading cross-domain dependency

title: Use re-export shims for backwards compatibility
rationale: Thin re-export modules avoid breaking existing imports across tests, MCP tools, and cross_repo while making the canonical location clear

title: Extract shared ID resolution to core/resolve.py
rationale: _resolve_assessment_id was copy-pasted between decisions.py and futures.py; decisions.py already had a generic _resolve_id that worked for any table

title: Extract shared CLI connection helper
rationale: find_git_root/get_db/check_and_migrate pattern was repeated verbatim across 17 CLI modules; cli/helpers.py reduces boilerplate
